string.name: owen
string.value: I heard that you can make a special item...

string.name: ludi020
string.value: The Missing Mechanical Parts : Toy Factory <Sector 4>

string.name: refine_sleepy
string.value: I heard that you can make some items...

string.name: fighter
string.value: 我想了解关于二转的问题...

string.name: magician
string.value: 我想了解关于二转的问题...

string.name: bowman
string.value: 我想了解关于二转的问题...

string.name: rogue
string.value: 我想了解关于二转的问题...

string.name: guildquest1_comment
string.value: I want to hear about the Guild Quest.

string.name: rein
string.value: I want to find out about this town.

string.name: boss_cat
string.value: I am ready to ace the quiz!

string.name: pio
string.value: What kind of shops do they have in this town?

string.name: begin4
string.value: I want to go to next place without finishing this quest...

string.name: library
string.value: How many books have I turned in?

string.name: hair_wedding3
string.value: Beauty or Beast! - Eye of the Beholder

string.name: DeliveryP1
string.value: Maple Claws - Visit Rowen the Fairy

string.name: PartyAmoria_enter
string.value: I'd like to start Amoria Party Quest!

string.name: halloween_Lud
string.value: I think I left something on the floor...

string.name: abouttheWedding
string.value: I want to know how to get married in Amoria!

string.name: refine_TCG1
string.value: I found a futuristic-looking object! I figured you might be right person to talk to with you being a time-traveling scientist and all...

string.name: refine_TCG2
string.value: I found something that looks really old...

string.name: claws_present
string.value: I've seen some monster dropping presents. Do these belong to you?

string.name: pongo_present
string.value: What do you think of these presents, O-Pongo?

string.name: suzy_lost
string.value: I have something I should tell you...

string.name: crane
string.value: I want to move another place.

string.name: Event00
string.value: I want to join the event.

string.name: make_ston
string.value: Producing the summoning rock or the magic rock

string.name: card_collect
string.value: Monsters are trying to break in!

string.name: job4_item
string.value: I would like to ask you something.

string.name: abroad_trip
string.value: I would like to take a trip to world maps.

string.name: nightmarket01
string.value: I want to defeat the boss.

string.name: shanghai004
string.value: I would like to leave this place.

string.name: desc_tree
string.value: Tell me about decorating the Christmas tree!!

string.name: warrior4
string.value: About the ultimate path of Warrior...

string.name: magician4
string.value: About the ultimate path of Magician...

string.name: s4snipe
string.value: I want to go to the Bowman's traning field.

string.name: s4efreet
string.value: I want to meet the Tanatos.

string.name: s4blocking_enter
string.value: I want to go to the Training field of Shield.

string.name: s4common1_out
string.value: Please, let me go out of this place.

string.name: s4common2
string.value: I would like to enter the Distorted Dimension.

string.name: refine_elnath
string.value: I would like to refine the items.

string.name: friend00
string.value: 我想增加我的好友列表。

string.name: guildquest1_board
string.value: 让我们看看公会公告板。

string.name: moonrabbit
string.value: 让我们开始保护月兔吧。

string.name: guild_proc
string.value: 我想创建公会或增加公会成员。

string.name: guild_mark
string.value: 我想为我的公会制作标志。

string.name: make_murueng
string.value: 我有个特殊请求想向杜先生提出。

string.name: cejan
string.value: 询问阿里安特居民有关粮食不足的问题

string.name: 4th_scroll
string.value: 我想用第四周年纪念卷轴进行交换。

string.name: karakasa
string.value: 我想和卡乐卡萨秘密交谈。

string.name: 4th_mapleWeapon
string.value: 我想获得第四周年纪念装备和卷轴

string.name: rank_user
string.value: 我想改变自己的另一个形象的特征

string.name: ariant_goldbox
string.value: 不足的宝藏正在被拿走

string.name: _card_collect
string.value: 我已经收集了怪物卡片。

string.name: X2007give
string.value: 枫叶节？维尔萨节？格鲁伯？！

string.name: naomi
string.value: 你能看看有什么问题吗？

string.name: jenu_homun
string.value: 我想去那个封闭的实验室。

string.name: pirate
string.value: 我想了解更多关于海盗的信息。

string.name: pirate4
string.value: 关于海盗职业的终极技能。

string.name: s4time
string.value: 请把我送回我来的世界。

string.name: refine_ellinia
string.value: 我想请求锻造一件物品。

string.name: nautil_black
string.value: 请带我去黑魔法师的门徒所在的地方。

string.name: aMatchMove
string.value: 我将前往阿里安特战斗竞技场/正在前往阿里安特战斗竞技场。

string.name: aMatchEnt
string.value: 我将报名参加阿里安特锦标赛/正在参加阿里安特锦标赛。

string.name: TCG5
string.value: 我准备好进行下一步 - 解放了！

string.name: MapleMarket7_Enter
string.value: 你想进入冒险岛周末市场吗？

string.name: necklaceGL
string.value: 你想了解更多关于枫叶之心的信息吗？

string.name: guyfawkes_tch
string.value: 你想了解更多关于恶意波动事件的信息吗？

string.name: guyfawkes_ch
string.value: 我想去能收集恶意波动秘密信件的地方。

string.name: 5th_mapleWeapon
string.value: 领取冒险岛周年纪念物品

string.name: 5th_gift
string.value: 查看第四届周年活动获奖者

string.name: gaga_Braid
string.value: 我想参加特工训练计划“怪物战斗！”。

string.name: mc2_enter
string.value: 我想开始第二届怪物嘉年华。

string.name: gaga_Fishing
string.value: 我想赢得学校的才艺表演。

string.name: firework
string.value: 我需要为图书募捐活动找回那些书。

string.name: Malay_Warp2
string.value: 你能把我传送到别的地方吗？

string.name: test_cooker
string.value: 你测试进行得怎么样了？

string.name: eventCoin
string.value: 我想查看我的星星邮票。

string.name: lostDoyo
string.value: 你会帮助一只迷路的长嘴鸟吗？

string.name: miro_ent
string.value: 你前往戈德里奇的迷宫。

string.name: balog_scroll
string.value: 我想用一块巴洛克皮革制作卷轴。

string.name: balog_accept
string.value: 我想组建一支巴洛克探险队。

string.name: BF_enter
string.value: 向卡桑德拉询问活动详情。

string.name: monster_medal
string.value: 我想获得怪物专家称号。

string.name: getRank
string.value: 我想了解更多关于神器狩猎的信息。

string.name: witchMaladyGL
string.value: 女巫玛拉蒂，我想帮你完成秘密任务。

string.name: oliviaEnter
string.value: 和管家谈谈奥利维亚的事。

string.name: goElinia
string.value: 你想成为一名魔法师吗？

string.name: goHenesys
string.value: 你想成为一名弓箭手吗？

string.name: giveupMoonPicture
string.value: 我想放弃寻找月亮照片。

string.name: AranGift
string.value: 点击此处查看你是否是阿兰的礼物活动的合格获奖者！

string.name: enterRabbitGround
string.value: 我想去月亮国月墓的游乐场。

string.name: TD_neo_Andy
string.value: 和安迪谈谈时间旅行的事。
